name: chr21_21q11_pericentromeric_SD_module
description: 21q11 pericentromeric region containing layered intra- and interchromosomal SD blocks ('21q11 SD module') with paralogs shared with chr11, chr18, chr2 pericentromeric regions; very low gene content, dominated by retrotransposed pseudogenes (TPTE-like, BAGE, USP25). Common site of unbalanced translocations.

architecture.internal_structure: Mosaic of 10-100 kb SD blocks duplicated from euchromatic donors elsewhere in the genome ('pericentromeric seeding'); enriched in TPTE2, BAGE2, USP25 paralogs.
